ChangeRequest.name: AE Requirements - Type of accounting item of the source of encumbrance
ChangeRequest.comment:
# Overview
Asset encumbrance requires to specify the Type of accounting item of the sources of encumbrance, meaning if the sources if encumbrance are:
* Financial liabilities * Off-balance sheet items
### Contact person
@Arianna.Nuvoli @Maria_Manuel.De_Amaro_Brito_Henriques @Pietro.Ferroni
### Business definition
Type of accounting item of the source of encumbrance define whether the source of encumbrance is a financial liability or an off balance sheet item.
### Legal definition
Annex XVII
### Reason for inclusion
AE integration
### Relationships
_This is issue is strictly connected to_ #5, solving #5 probably solves this one too.
### Relevant Framework/Template
F 32.04.b, F 34.00.b/c, F 35.00.a/b/d, F 36.01.a, F 36.02.a
### Additional documentation/links (optional)
_\[Additional info\]_
### Before closing checklist
- [ ] Assignee for review - [ ] Assignee to close - [ ] Other actions
